title: eulophia stuhlmannii
intro: Eulophia stuhlmannii, also known as the African orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Eulophia stuhlmannii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
